title: 11 Deposit Research on ORS
body_text:
11	Deposit Research on ORS
11.1	Overview of Deposit Research on ORS
Use ORS to search for, view, and print deposit slips and the cheques within a deposit. The following items are available in ORS:
Canadian dollar Mobile Deposits
Canadian and US dollar Branch Capture Deposits
Canadian and US dollar Corporate Capture Deposits
Paper Canadian dollar, US dollar and Foreign Funds Deposits
Images of deposit adjustments are also available via the Adjustments Tab on ORS. See Section 11.7, Searching for Adjustments on ORS for more information. Images of the adjustments are also available for download on the File and Report Exchange. See the Incoming Clearing Items Part for more information. See Section 1.2, ORS Service Windows, Image Availability, and Archive, for information on the availability of cheque images in ORS.
Related Information
Section 1.2
, ORS Service Windows, Image Availability, and Archive
11.2	Searching for Deposit Slips on ORS
Proceed as follows to search for deposit slips on ORS:
Log in to ORS and select the
Deposit
link on the ORS menu bar. See Figure 1.
Figure 1: Deposit Option
To search for a specific deposit type, select the applicable Type and Tran Code from the dropdown. See Figure 2.
Note:	To filter Mobile Deposits slips, select
(9100) MRDC CAD Deposit Slip
from the TranCode drop-down. For Mobile Deposits, Central 1 automatically creates a deposit slip for every 200 deposits.
Note:	To search for foreign funds deposits, select
All
as the currency type. When the results are displayed, select the currency column to sort the deposits by currency. Deposits that have an âXXXâ currency type are foreign funds deposits.
Note:	Use the Trace # field to search for Branch or Corporate deposits by trace number. This number can be obtained from the RDBC/RDBU report.
Figure 2: Deposit Search
Select
Submit
or press
Enter
.
View the deposit slips. See Figure 3.
Note:	Select a column heading to change the sort order.
Figure 3: Deposit Search Results
Beginning Another Search
To begin another search
(see Figure 4):
Select the
Previous Deposit Slip Query
link to return to the Deposit Search page. This returns the user to the page with the most recently used deposit slip search criteria.
Alternatively, select the
Deposit
link on the ORS menu bar to start a new search.
Figure 4: Begin Another Search
Related Information
Appendix #A-7
, ORS Search Fields
Appendix #A-8
, ORS Deposit Search Results Grid
11.3	Viewing, Printing, and Saving Deposit Slip Images on ORS
Proceed as follows to view, print, and save deposit slip images on ORS:
Log in to ORS and identify the deposit slips that you want to view, print, or save. See Section 11.2, Searching for Deposit Slips on ORS.
Check the box in the V column beside each deposit slip that you want to view, print, or save, or choose
Select All
. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: View Deposit Slip
Note:	If there are more than 5000 matches, you will be prompted to refine your search.
Select
Submit
or press
Enter
.
Note:	The more boxes you check, the longer it takes to display the results.
Printing One Deposit Slip at a Time
To print one deposit slip at a time:
Select the
P
link in the A column. See Figure 6.
Figure 6: Print Deposit Slip
Note:	Images are displayed in the same order as the list of deposit slips on the Deposit Search Results page.
Note:	Select the
Z
link in the A column to zoom and enlarge the deposit slip image. Select
Z
again to return the image to its normal size.
Note:	You can also access the P link from the Deposit Search Results page.
Use the browser print function to print the deposit slip image. See Figure 7.
Figure 7: Image Print Screen
Printing Multiple Deposit Slips
To print multiple deposit slips at the same time:
Check the box in the V column to select the deposit slips that you want to print.
Select
Print Selected
. See Figure 8.
Figure 8: Print Selected
Note:	You can also access the Print Selected link from the Deposit Search Results page.
Use the browser print function to print the deposit slip images.
Saving an Image of the Deposit Slip
To save an image of the deposit slip as a PDF:
Check the box in the V column beside each deposit slip that you want to save. See Figure 9.
Figure 9: Save to File
Select
Save to File
.
Note:	The Save to File link is also available on the Deposit Search Results page.
Select
Save
when prompted.
Select the location where you want to save the file and select
Save
.
Select
Close
to close the Download Complete dialogue box.
Viewing or Printing Cheques within a Deposit
To view or print cheques within the deposit:
Select the
T
link in the A column on the Deposit View page. See Figure 10.
Figure 10: View Cheques in Deposit
The cheques within the deposit are listed below the image of the deposit slip. See Figure 11.
Figure 11: Cheques in Deposit
Note:	Select a column heading to change the sort order.
To print an image of a cheque, select the
P
link in the A column of the Cheques in Deposit page. See Figure 11.
To print multiple cheque images at once, check the box in the V column beside each cheque that you want to print.
Select
Print Selected
on the Cheques in Deposit page. A new browser window opens and displays the image print page (or pages). See Figure 12.
Note:	Use the print command in the browser to print the image(s).
Figure 12: Image Print Page
To save the cheque images as a PDF, check the box in the V column beside each cheque that you want to save. Select
Save to File
on the Cheques in Deposit Page. Follow the Windows prompts to save the file.
11.4	Searching for Cheques on Deposit (by Deposit Slip) on ORS
Proceed as follows to search ORS for a cheque on deposit, by deposit slip:
Log in to ORS and locate the appropriate deposit slip. See Section 11.2, Searching for Deposit Slips on ORS.
Select the
S
link in the A column beside the deposit that you want to search. See Figure 13.
Note: 	The S link is also available on the Deposit View page.
Figure 13: Search Cheques by Deposit Slip
Enter the search criteria. See Figure 14.
Figure 14: Cheque Search Criteria
Select
Submit
or press
Enter
.
To print a cheque in the deposit, select the
P
link in the A column. See Figure 15.
Figure 15: Cheques in Deposit
A new browser window opens and displays the image print page(s). See Figure 16.
Figure 16: Image Print Page
Note:	Use the Print command in the browser to print the image(s).
To print multiple cheque images, check the box in the V column beside each item that you want to print, then select
Print Selected
. See Figure 17.
Figure 17: Print Selected
Saving the Image as a PDF
To save the image as a PDF:
Check the box in the V column beside each cheque that you want to save. See Figure 18.
Figure 18: Save to File
Select
Save to File
.
Note:	The Save to File link is also available on Deposit Search Results page.
Select
Save
when prompted.
Select the location where you want to save the file and select
Save
.
Select
Close
to close the Download Complete dialogue box.
11.5	Searching for Cheques on Deposit (Directly) on ORS
It isnât necessary to search for cheques on deposit by deposit slip. Proceed as follows to search ORS for a cheque on deposit directly:
Log in to ORS and select the
Deposit
link on the ORS menu bar. See Figure 19.
Figure 19: Deposit Option
Enter search criteria and select
Cheque
as the type. To search for Canadian dollar Mobile Deposits, select
(9100) MRDC CAD cheque
in the TranCode field. See Figure 20.
Note:	To search for foreign funds deposits, select
All
as the currency type. When the results are displayed, select the currency column to sort the deposits by currency. Deposits that have an âXXXâ currency type are foreign funds deposits.
Figure 20: Deposit Search
Select
Submit
or press
Enter
.
View the cheques on deposit that match the search criteria. See Figure 21.
Figure 21: Cheque Search Results
Check the box in the V column beside each cheque that you want to view or choose
Select All
.
Note:	If there are more than 5000 matches, you will be prompted to refine your search.
Select
Submit
or press
Enter
.
Note:	The more boxes you check, the longer it takes to display the results.
The Cheque View page opens and displays the cheque details and an image of the front of the cheque. See Figure 22.
Figure 22: Cheque View
Note:	Select the
Z
link in the A column to zoom and enlarge the image. Select
Z
again to return the cheque image to normal size.
Note:	Images are displayed in the same order as the cheques are listed on the Cheque Search Results page.
To print an image of a single cheque, select the
P
link in the A column.
To print images of multiple cheques, check the box in the V column beside each item that you want to print. Select the
Print Selected
link. A new browser window opens and displays the image print page(s).
Note:	The P link is also accessible from the Cheque Search Results page.
Note:	Use the print command in the browser to print the image(s).
Select the
T
link in the A column to view the deposit slip that the cheque is included on as well as the other cheques in the deposit. The Cheques on Deposit page opens and displays an image of the deposit slip and a list of the cheques in the deposit.
Note:	The cheque you initially searched for is highlighted in blue.
Saving the Cheque Image(s) as a PDF
To save the cheque image(s) as a PDF:
Check the box beside each cheque that you want to save.
Select
Save to File
.
Note:	The Save to File link is also available on Deposit Search Results page.
Select
Save
when prompted.
Select the location where you want to save the file and select
Save
.
Select
Close
to close the Download Complete dialogue box.
Related Information
Appendix #A-7
, ORS Search Fields
Appendix #A-9
, ORS Cheque on Deposit Search Results Grid
11.6	Searching for Deposit Adjustments on ORS
Central 1 adjusts the amount of a deposit if it identifies one of the following errors:
A customer entered an incorrect amount on the mobile banking application when making a Mobile Deposit.
An item was deposited that cannot be processed (e.g., image quality problems, Piggybacks).
An item amount was keyed incorrectly and a deposit was force balanced.
An item was received that shouldnât have been included in the deposit (e.g., the currency of the item doesnât match the currency of the deposit type, the item isnât eligible for Clearing).
See the Deposit Processing Part for procedures on deposit adjustments.
Use the Adjustments tab to search for debit and credit deposit adjustments by selected date range, or by currency and transaction code. For each adjustment listed, a link to the deposit slip and to the adjusted item is provided. If an adjustment is printed, all adjusted items are printed with the adjustment and deposit slip.
Proceed as follows to search for debit and credit deposit adjustments:
Select the
Adjustments
tab. See Figure 23.
Figure 23: The Adjustments tab
Enter search criteria and select
Submit
. See Figure 24.
Figure 24: Searching for Adjustments
Select the appropriate item(s) to view as described in Chapter 8, Viewing, Printing, and Saving Cheque Images and AFT Transactions on ORS. See Figure 25.
Figure 25: Adjustments Search Results
Select the
T
link to view, print or save the adjustment, deposit slip, and adjusted items.
END
